violations.description: Plumbing system. — --- Hot water needs to be operational when in service.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --- Paper towels need to be hung
Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. - raw meats found above ready to eat foods.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. - Fork handle found in salad

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. - Items found in reach-in undated.
Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface was not disassembled for proper cleaning. - Fry cutter needs to be deep cleaned.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Countertops, tables, handles on all equipment needs to be cleaned--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. - 3 comp sink not being used properly, dirty dishes found in sanitizer sink.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. - to go containers found on floor.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. - Handwash found dirty
Storage areas for refuse, recyclables, and returnables. — --- Trash found outside needs to be removed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors need to be cleaned.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
